_comment: Meraki Node 3: today/ASAP fast path must call asap_slots on first entry without re-asking timeframe; negative control when no day stated.

scenarios.name: T1 — Today at Node 1: first Node 3 turn calls asap_slots (massage today regression)

history.content: Hello. I am wondering, do you have any time for a massage today?
Which type of massage were you after — Remedial, Relaxation, Pregnancy, Oncology Massage, Myotherapy, or Lymphatic Drainage?
Have you had Remedial Massage with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says 'Checking that now, one moment.' and calls smart_voice_agent with intent='asap_slots' and start_date equal to today (YYYY-MM-DD from {{current_time_local}}). FAIL if agent asks any timeframe question ('When would you like to come in?', 'When would you like to come in today?', or similar), speaks availability without calling the tool, or calls intent='availability' or 'find_next_available' instead of asap_slots.

scenarios.name: T2 — ASAP after service resolution: no timeframe re-ask

history.content: I'd like a remedial massage as soon as possible please.
Have you had Remedial Massage with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says 'Checking that now, one moment.' and calls smart_voice_agent intent='asap_slots' with start_date=today. FAIL if agent asks when they would like to come in or any clarifying timeframe question before calling the tool.

scenarios.name: T3 — No day stated: must ask timeframe (negative control)

history.content: I'd like to book a remedial massage please.
Have you had Remedial Massage with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'When would you like to come in?' (spoken only, no tool call this turn). FAIL if agent calls smart_voice_agent or asks a redundant sub-question when no day or ASAP was stated anywhere in the conversation.

scenarios.name: N1 — Next available request: asap_slots not find_next_available

history.content: What's your next available remedial massage appointment?
Have you had Remedial Massage with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says 'Checking that now, one moment.' and calls smart_voice_agent intent='asap_slots' with start_date=today. FAIL if agent calls intent='find_next_available' or intent='availability' without a date, or asks a timeframe question when next available was already stated.
